results.title: From a white belt all the way to the world stage
results.description: At just 16 years old, Rockhampton karate athlete Hayden Frankish is preparing to represent Australia at the SKIF World Championships [...] The post From a white belt all the way to the world stage appeared first on Central Queensland Today .

results.title: David Malukas distraught after losing slimmest Indy 500 finish ever
results.description: The 110th running of the Indianapolis 500 produced the tightest finish in the race's history, with Felix Rosenqvist edging David Malukas at the line

results.title: Fudd’s third-quarter surge powers Wings past Liberty in Ionescu’s debut
Late pass sends Felix Rosenqvist past David Malukas for the closest Indianapolis 500 win in history
results.description: Felix Rosenqvist swung to the outside of David Malukas, then found a way past the Team Penske driver to win the closest Indianapolis 500 in history by a margin of 0.0233 seconds on Sunday.
